Name: ID
Description: A guid that is the unique identifier of the item

Name: Class_01
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 1

Name: Class_02
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 2

Name: Class_03
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 3

Name: Class_04
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 4

Name: Class_05
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 5

Name: Class_06
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 6

Name: Class_07
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 7

Name: Class_08
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 8

Name: Class_09
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 9

Name: Class_10
Description: Item class code referring to ItemClasses with ClassID 10

Name: CopyRemarks
Description: Copy sales remarks to sales lines

Name: CostPriceCurrency
Description: The currency of the current and proposed cost price

Name: CustomField
Description: Custom field endpoint. Provided only for the Exact Online Premium users.

Name: EndDate
Description: Together with StartDate this determines if the item is active

Name: ExtraDescription
Description: Extra description text, slightly longer than the regular description (255 instead of 60)

Name: GLCosts
Description: GL account the cost entries will be booked on. This overrules the GL account from the item group. If the license contains 'Intuit integration' this property overrides the value in Settings, not the item group.

Name: GLCostsCode
Description: Code of GL account for costs

Name: GLCostsWorkInProgress
Description: GL account the work in progress project cost entries will be booked on. This overrules the GL account from the item group.

Name: GLCostsWorkInProgressCode
Description: Code of GL account for costs Work In Progress

Name: GLCostsWorkInProgressDescription
Description: Description of GLCosts Work In Progress

Name: GLRevenue
Description: GL account the revenue will be booked on. This overrules the GL account from the item group. If the license contains 'Intuit integration' this property overrides the value in Settings, not the item group.

Name: GLRevenueWorkInProgress
Description: GL account the work in progress project revenue entries will be booked on. This overrules the GL account from the item group.

Name: GLRevenueWorkInProgressCode
Description: Code of GLRevenue Work In Progress

Name: GLRevenueWorkInProgressDescription
Description: Description of GLRevenue Work In Progress

Name: GLStock
Description: GL account the stock entries will be booked on. This overrules the GL account from the item group. If the license contains 'Intuit integration' this property overrides the value in Settings, not the item group.

Name: GLStockCode
Description: Code of GL account for stock

Name: GrossWeight
Description: Gross weight for international goods shipments

Name: IsBatchItem
Description: Indicates if batches are used for this item

Name: IsBatchNumberItem
Description: This property is obsolete. Use property 'IsBatchItem' instead.

Name: IsFractionAllowedItem
Description: Indicates if fractions (for example 0.35) are allowed for quantities of this item

Name: IsMakeItem
Description: Indicates that an Item is produced to Inventory, not purchased

Name: IsNewContract
Description: Only used for packages (IsPackageItem=1). To indicate if this package is a new contract type package

Name: IsPackageItem
Description: Indicates if the item is a package item. Can only be created in the hosting administration

Name: IsPurchaseItem
Description: Indicates if the item can be purchased

Name: IsRegistrationCodeItem
Description: Indicated if the item is used in voucher functionality

Name: IsSalesItem
Description: Indicates if the item can be sold

Name: IsSerialItem
Description: Indicates that serial numbers are used for this item

Name: IsSerialNumberItem
Description: This property is obsolete. Use property 'IsSerialItem' instead.

Name: IsStockItem
Description: If you have the Trade or Manufacturing license and you check this property the item will be shown in the stock positions overview, stock counts and transaction lists. If you have the Invoice module and you check this property you will get a general journal entry based on the Stock and Costs G/L accounts of the item group. If you don’t want the general journal entry to be created you should change the Stock/Costs G/L account on the Item group page to the type Costs instead of Inventory. If you have the CRM Standalone license, the item will not be available.

Name: IsSubcontractedItem
Description: Indicates if the item is provided by an outside supplier

Name: IsTaxableItem
Description: Indicates if tax needs to be calculated for this item

Name: IsTime
Description: Indicates if the item is a time unit item (for example a labor hour item)

Name: IsWebshopItem
Description: Indicates if the item can be exported to a web shop. If you have the CRM Standalone license, the item will not be available.

Name: ItemGroup
Description: GUID of Item group of the item

Name: NetWeight
Description: Net weight for international goods shipments

Name: NetWeightUnit
Description: Net Weight unit for international goods shipment, only available in manufacturing packages

Name: Picture
Description: This field is write-only. The picture can be downloaded through PictureUrl and PictureThumbnailUrl.

Name: PictureThumbnailUrl
Description: Url where thumbnail picture can be retrieved

Name: PictureUrl
Description: Url where picture can be retrieved

Name: StartDate
Description: Together with EndDate this determines if the item is active

Name: Unit
Description: The standard unit of this item

Name: UnitType
Description: Type of unit: A=Area, L=Length, O=Other, T=Time, V=Volume, W=Weight
